message: 🌱 Add opentofu: [State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault) mission (#706)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-1171-state-encryption-key-providers-azure-key-vault",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: [State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault)",
+    "description": "[State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault). Requested by 82+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentofu deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentofu version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nhelm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentofu installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentofu configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu\n```\n**Parent:** #1030\n**Depends on:** #1166\n**Blueprint PR:** #1132\n\n## Acceptance criteria\n\n1. Implement a key provider that loads an encryption key from the Azure Key Vault."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault)",
+        "description": "Implementation of the azure key provider.\n\nCurrently only works with the default env vars: \n```bash\nexport AZURE_TENANT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET=\"...\"\n```\n\nTODO:\r\n\n## Target Release\n\n1.7.0\n```yaml\nexport AZURE_TENANT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET=\"...\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault)\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Implementation of the azure key provider.\n\nCurrently only works with the default env vars: \n```bash\nexport AZURE_TENANT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET=\"...\"\n```\n\nTODO:\r\n\n## Target Release\n\n1.7.0",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "export AZURE_TENANT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_ID=\"...\"\nexport AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET=\"...\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
